name: FANTASY RPG | World Of Migorian
description:
Welcome!

Welcome To The World of migorian where magic is the core and a lot of Fantasy races!.

[Version 1.0]

-New Magic(Blood,String,Sound,Transfiguration,Ink)


[coming soon]

-2 biomes


[Biography]

migorian lands shapes like donut with the outline and center is an ocean. 

There's 6 Biomes and each biomes has SubBiome. 

Current available that can be visited is Grassland, snowy, desert, and Sky Archipelago


[magic system]

You can choose any magic to start with, by killing enemies you will level up.

You Can Get a New Magic from various Place Like Nolema Library or after Doing Quest!

[Rank System]

By Defeating enemies and completing quest from the Guild, you can Rank up!


[party system]

You can recruit People into your party!.if your party Did something that save million then You can Promote into Hero party!
